name: Tortilla Casserole
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain the tuna and sauté onion and garlic in oil until soft.
2. Stir in tomatoes, olives, chiles, cumin, sugar, and salt.
3. Simmer covered for 15 minutes. Remove from heat and stir in tuna.
4. Spoon half of the tuna mixture into the casserole dish.
5. Top with half of the shredded cheese.
6. Combine cottage cheese and egg. Dollop over the remaining cheese.
7. Place tortillas over the cottage cheese mixture, mounding the remaining tuna mixture on top.
8. Sprinkle with the remaining Monterey Jack cheese.
9. Bake at 350 degrees for 30 minutes. Cool for 10 minutes before serving.
